tips: Profile before optimizing to identify bottlenecks
Optimize the most impactful areas first (80/20 rule)
Measure performance before and after changes
Avoid memory leaks by properly disposing resources
Use object pooling for frequently created/destroyed objects
Prefer stack allocation over heap when possible
Implement lazy loading for large data structures
Use appropriate data structures (hash tables vs arrays)
Minimize I/O operations and batch when possible
Consider parallel processing for independent tasks
Implement code splitting and lazy loading
